header: Eatery Passion Project | Community Food Service Platform Founder, CTO
bullets: Launched a food service platform with peers who shared a passion for cooking which included serving weekly meals with diverse menus as well as ensuring customer satisfaction with appropriate hospitality

Developed and leveraged React and mySQL to create front and back ends for a web app, including features such as mobile ordering and rewards system, to expand accessibility and reach and grow consumer retention
Led team of fifteen staff members by managing schedules and designing menus for up to thirty customers a week, ensuring alignment and unity within team through clear communication and details
